title: Ubiquiti UXG-Enterprise - UniFi Gateway Enterprise
description: Notice: For this product, we provide individual project-based pricing depending on the configuration, scope, and conditions of the project. For more information, please contact your sales representative Ubiquiti UniFi Gateway Enterprise is a device from the Enterprise series designed for business environments This powerful enterprise gateway is equipped with two SFP28 ports, two SFP+ ports, and two 2.5G Ethernet ports, providing high-speed connectivity. One SFP28 and one 2.5G Ethernet port are dedicated as WAN ports. Of the remaining four ports, two additional ports can be used as WAN . It offers a complete network security solution with advanced threat mitigation features, including intrusion detection and prevention systems (IDS/IPS), content filtering, and VLAN-based traffic segmentation. The… The Gateway Enterprise does not include device management software . To manage it, UniFi CloudKey, UniFi Network Server, or official UniFi Hosting is required 18-core ARM® v8.2, 2 GHz, 16 GB RAM Redundant power via 2 hot-swap supplies, 2x 150W Multi-WAN with load-balancing and failover Support for multiple VPN protocols Management via UniFi Network Server 8.3.32 and newer Device (2) 230V power cables (2) 19" rack mounts incl. screws (4) Rack mounting kit screw + floating nut (4) Self-adhesive rubber pads SFP28 DAC cable (2) Cable management accessories
